summary: Patients at LIPS Healthcare are most dissatisfied with unclear or miscellaneous issues ("Other"), making up 26% of complaints, followed by billing and staff attitude problems (17% each). Fewer complaints relate to booking, administration, or treatment quality, but these still contribute to overall dissatisfaction.
